latin: Piscis caeruleus, qui memoriam brevem habebat, cum amicus eius spem omnem amisisset, cantare coepit: 'nata modo, nata modo, nata modo!' et semper in animo tenebat natandum esse.

questions.prompt: What is the blue fish's main problem?
questions.target: She has a very short memory
choices: She has a very short memory

translation: A blue fish, who had a short memory, when her friend had lost all hope, began to sing: 'Just swim, just swim, just swim!' And she always kept in mind that one must keep swimming.
